global_description: A small, slender bird with a streamlined body and a short, conical beak. Its plumage is predominantly brown with streaks of black and white, providing a camouflaged appearance. The wings and tail are medium-length with a slightly rounded shape.

part_details.plumage: Brown with black and white streaks, providing camouflage.
part_details.beak: Short, conical, and pale in color.
part_details.eye_ring: Distinct white ring around the eye.

spatial_relations: The wings are positioned on either side of the body.
The tail extends from the rear of the body.
The beak is located at the front of the head.
The eye ring encircles the eye.
